query: Build a DataTable component for our user management page at src/components/users-table.tsx. It needs sortable columns for name, email, role, and status with getSortedRowModel and column header click handlers.
My TanStack Table re-renders the entire table on every keystroke in the global filter input. The columns array is defined inside the component. How do I fix this performance issue?
I need server-side pagination for our orders table. The API at /api/orders accepts page and pageSize query params and returns { data, totalCount }. Set up manualPagination with useReactTable.
Add row selection with checkboxes to our products table. I need a select-all checkbox in the header, individual row checkboxes, and a bulk delete button that shows the count of selected rows.
Implement column visibility toggles using a DropdownMenu from shadcn/ui. Users should be able to show/hide the 'email', 'phone', and 'address' columns while 'name' stays always visible.
I need virtual scrolling for a table with 50,000 rows. Set up @tanstack/react-virtual with useReactTable so we render only visible rows in the viewport.

Create column definitions using createColumnHelper<Invoice> for our invoices table. Columns: invoiceNumber (string), client (accessor function combining firstName + lastName), amount (formatted as currency), dueDate (formatted date), status (badge component).
Add a faceted filter for the 'status' column that shows checkboxes for 'active', 'pending', 'cancelled' with counts next to each option. Use getFilteredRowModel and ColumnFiltersState.
The sorting state resets whenever our data refetches from the API. I need to make sorting controlled with useState so it persists across data updates. Currently using internal table state.
Add column pinning to our wide analytics table so the 'Metric Name' column stays fixed on the left when users scroll horizontally. Use ColumnPinningState with column.pin('left').
Create a responsive pricing cards layout with three tiers using CSS grid. Each card has a title, price, feature list, and CTA button.
I need to display tabular data in a simple HTML table with Tailwind styling. Just a static table, no sorting or filtering needed. About 10 rows of contact information.
Build a Kanban board where tasks can be dragged between 'To Do', 'In Progress', and 'Done' columns using dnd-kit. Each column shows task cards.
Set up a TanStack Query useQuery hook to fetch user data from /api/users and display it in a list with loading and error states.
I need to export our database query results to CSV. The user clicks a download button and gets a CSV file with headers matching the column names.
Create a comparison table where users can select 2-4 products and see their specs side by side. It's a static layout, not a data grid.
Implement a spreadsheet-like component where users can edit cell values inline, add new rows, and the changes save to the database. Like Google Sheets.
Add aria-sort attributes to our existing table headers and make the sort buttons keyboard accessible. The table already works, I just need the accessibility fixes.
Build a data visualization dashboard with charts showing revenue over time, user growth, and conversion rates using Recharts. Include a summary table below.
I need pagination for a blog post list. Show 10 posts per page with Previous/Next buttons. The posts come from TanStack Query and there's no table involved.
